summary: All three requirements are implemented in the diff. The FarmGallerySection.tsx now references the correct optimized image assets (lemon-trees.dim_1200x800.jpg, flowering-mangoes.dim_1200x800.jpg, farm-greenery.dim_1200x800.jpg) with the correct captions ('Lemon Trees', 'Flowering Mangoes', 'Farm Greenery'). The images are used as static frontend assets, consistent with constraints. No hallucinated features were detected.
